personal.name: Keshav Patidar
personal.heroDescription: Passionate Full Stack Developer focused on building modern web applications, solving real-world problems, and continuously learning emerging technologies.

paragraphs: I’m Keshav Patidar, a third-year CSIT student at Acropolis Institute of Technology and Research and a passionate full stack developer from Indore, India. I enjoy building modern web applications, exploring AI technologies, and working on real-world projects that solve practical problems.
I believe in discipline, smart work, and continuous learning, and I’m always looking for opportunities to improve my technical and problem-solving skills through projects and hands-on experience.

education.institution: Acropolis Institute of Technology and Research

contact.description: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas or opportunities to be part of your visions. Feel free to reach out to me!

projects.title: Green Mitra
projects.subtitle: Smart Agriculture Testing & Advisory System
projects.description: IoT-based smart agriculture solution using ESP32 and sensors to monitor NPK values, moisture, and pH levels. It provides precision farming insights and crop/fertilizer recommendations through a full-stack dashboard.

projects.title: Campus Connect
projects.subtitle: College Communication Platform
projects.description: A centralized college communication and management platform to share notices, events, updates, and academic information. Dramatically improves student-faculty communication and record keeping.

projects.title: AI Attendance System
projects.subtitle: Face Recognition Attendance Management
projects.description: AI-powered attendance management system utilizing webcam face recognition to automatically mark digital attendance. Reduces manual work and significantly increases accuracy.

projects.title: AI Interviewer
projects.subtitle: Strict Professional Interview System
projects.description: AI-based technical interview preparation system that asks technical questions, analyzes answers in real-time, and provides constructive feedback to help candidates improve their communication and performance.

certificates.title: Fundamental of Object Oriented programming Methodology
